economic_notes: First Nation holds investments in T'Se'Kame' Forestry Ltd. (100% owned), T'Se'Kame' Forestry Limited Partnership (99.99% limited partner), and Musgamagw Fisheries Group Limited Partnership (33.33% limited partner). Related party transactions with T'Se'Kame' Forestry LP include garbage collection and water taxi services.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence about the carrying amount of the investment in T'Se'Kame' Forestry Limited Partnership ($279,556) and the share of net income ($68,499) as at December 31, 2019. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis. Total government transfers calculated as Government of Canada ($1,413,276) + ISC ($1,056,486) + Province of BC ($1,019,531) + First Nation Health Authority ($593,191) = $4,082,484. Current liabilities include accounts payable $899,520 + wages and benefits payable $16,554 + deferred revenue $58,346 = $974,420. Annual debt service reflects only repayment of long-term debt ($22,090) as no new proceeds in 2020. Detailed program expense breakdown not available in pages provided; schedules referenced as pages 14-65 but not fully shown.
